items.title: Trump scraps threat of 20% fee on Hormuz cargo as US resumes blockade of Iran ports
items.summary: Trump drops a 24-hour-old vow to charge cargo ships for using the Strait as the US continues its battle to break Iran's hold on the waterway.

items.title: Strait of Hormuz 'faultline' exposes weakness of the US-Iran deal
items.summary: Control of the waterway has become a key point of contention between the US and Iran, as a ceasefire deal falters.

items.title: Israeli strike on police post in north Gaza kills seven, officials say
items.summary: A senior officer in the Hamas-run police force was among those killed in the strike, which Israel's military says targeted "terrorists".

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 矢板明夫遇襲發酵！日本跨黨派議員：不容許暴力強權打壓言論

items.title: 通話內容曝光！川普施壓以色列自黎、敘撤兵 納坦雅胡面臨雙重夾擊
items.summary: 美國與以色列官員透露，美國總統川普向以色列總理納坦雅胡（Benjamin Netanyahu）表示，以色列應開始將軍隊自敘利亞撤出並重新部署，同時也敦促其在黎巴嫩採取相同作法...…

items.title: 20％補償費用不收了！ 川普曝內幕：很多波灣國家打給我
